## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Brendan's career plans and Marcel's experience building fwd.digital, exploring opportunities in AI-enabled services and media.](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel raised $12M for fwd.digital to scale operations, recruit top talent, and manage cash flow as the company grows rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Brendan is exploring ways to leverage AI in his consulting work and build a scalable business, while also growing his newsletter as a potential platform](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [fwd.digital has built proprietary AI infrastructure to deliver scalable services, focusing on inbound rather than outbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Growth and Funding

  - [Raised $12M Series A to scale operations and recruit top talent](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Growing rapidly: $2.9M revenue in Q4, hit $6.1M as of Feb 26](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [54 deals in pipeline, including 16 alpha contract signatures](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Averaging 20 demos per week through inbound interest](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Built proprietary AI infrastructure for scalable service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### Brendan's Current Work and Future Plans

  - [Considering building "micro-SaaS" or productized services](https://fathom.video/share/S8T3D7xdi5vLG1PHkQtwGb_DNkfuZgL3?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
